variables.name: API_BASE_URL
variables.rationale: API route exposed to app/frontends
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: AUTH_COOKIE_DOMAIN
variables.rationale: Conventional app auth cookie domain fallback for standard auth.
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: AUTH_EMAIL_FROM
variables.rationale: Conventional app auth sender fallback for standard auth.
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: CI
variables.rationale: Conventional CI marker used to disable interactive console behavior.
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: CLICOLOR_FORCE
variables.rationale: Standard terminal color control.
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: DATABASE_URL
variables.rationale: Conventional database URL. Managed dev Postgres does not inject this into app, setup, DB setup, or worker environments; prefer `DatabaseURL` for Scenery apps.
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: DatabaseURL
variables.rationale: scenery app-style database URL env and managed app database authority. Used when `auth.database_url_env` is `DatabaseURL`
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ELECTRIC_INSECURE
variables.rationale: Electric container setting injected for local managed Electric processes.
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ELECTRIC_PORT
variables.rationale: Electric container port injected into managed Electric processes.
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ELECTRIC_REPLICATION_STREAM_ID
variables.rationale: Electric replication stream ID. scenery sets a deterministic session-scoped default
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ELECTRIC_URL
variables.rationale: Public Electric route for app/frontends
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ELECTRIC_USAGE_REPORTING
variables.rationale: Electric container setting injected for local managed Electric processes.
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: GF_
variables.rationale: Grafana child-process environment family. scenery filters ambient GF_* values and injects only owned settings unless explicitly preserving them.
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: GF_PATHS_DATA
variables.rationale: Grafana data directory
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: GF_PATHS_LOGS
variables.rationale: Grafana logs directory
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: GF_PATHS_PLUGINS
variables.rationale: Grafana plugins directory
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: GF_PATHS_PROVISIONING
variables.rationale: Grafana provisioning directory
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: GF_SERVER_HTTP_ADDR
variables.rationale: Grafana child loopback bind address
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: GF_SERVER_HTTP_PORT
variables.rationale: Grafana child loopback bind port
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: GF_SERVER_ROOT_URL
variables.rationale: Grafana public root URL
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: HOME
variables.rationale: Host home directory used by browser discovery fallback.
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: JWT_SECRET
variables.rationale: Conventional app JWT signing secret fallback for standard auth.
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: NO_COLOR
variables.rationale: Standard terminal color opt-out.
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_AGENT_DISABLE
variables.rationale: `1` disables local agent usage. `scenery up --detach` requires this to be unset
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_AGENT_HOME
variables.rationale: Overrides the machine-wide local agent home. Default is `~/.scenery`
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_AGENT_ROUTER_ADDR
variables.rationale: Overrides the agent router listen address. Default is `127.0.0.1:9440`
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_AGENT_ROUTER_TLS
variables.rationale: `0` disables HTTPS routing; `1` forces HTTPS. Default is HTTPS
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_AGENT_SOCKET
variables.rationale: Overrides the agent Unix control socket path
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_AGENT_TRUST
variables.rationale: `1` asks the agent to trust the existing local scenery CA when starting HTTPS routing
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_API_BASE_URL
variables.rationale: scenery-prefixed API route exposed to app/frontends
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_APP_ID
variables.rationale: Base app identity from `.scenery.json`
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_APP_ROOT
variables.rationale: Absolute app root path
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_APP_ROOT_HASH
variables.rationale: Stable hash of the app root path
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_AUTH_COOKIE_DOMAIN
variables.rationale: Auth cookie domain; empty in default local agent dev
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_AUTH_DATABASE_URL
variables.rationale: Fallback DB URL for standard auth when app-specific envs are unset
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_AUTH_EMAIL_FROM
variables.rationale: Fallback sender address for standard auth email flows when `auth.email_from_env` and `AUTH_EMAIL_FROM` are unset
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_AUTH_JWT_SECRET
variables.rationale: Fallback JWT signing secret for standard auth when `auth.jwt_secret_env` and `JWT_SECRET` are unset
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_BASE_APP_ID
variables.rationale: Base app ID for a session
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_BIN
variables.rationale: Target-app helper override for the scenery binary path
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_BRANCH
variables.rationale: Git branch captured for the dev session
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_BUILD_ID
variables.rationale: Worker build ID. Agent dev uses the session ID
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_CORS_ALLOW_ORIGINS
variables.rationale: Comma-separated production CORS allowlist outside dev endpoint mode
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_DEV_CACHE_DIR
variables.rationale: Overrides build/dashboard cache root. This does not change agent home
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_DEV_DASHBOARD_ADDR
variables.rationale: Overrides the dashboard backend address used by dev sessions. Normally allocated automatically
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_DEV_DASHBOARD_UI_DIR
variables.rationale: Overrides the built dashboard UI directory used by the dashboard backend
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_DEV_DETACHED_CHILD
variables.rationale: Marks the background child used by `scenery up --detach`
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_DEV_ELECTRIC_BIN
variables.rationale: Explicit local Electric binary path; scenery does not search `PATH` for it
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_DEV_ELECTRIC_UPSTREAM
variables.rationale: Explicit Electric upstream; scenery registers it as the session Electric backend
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_DEV_ENDPOINTS
variables.rationale: `1` enables dev/admin endpoints such as `/__scenery/config` and `/debug/pprof/*`
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_DEV_GRAFANA
variables.rationale: `auto`, `1`, or `0`. Default `auto` starts Grafana when possible
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_DEV_GRAFANA_DOWNLOAD
variables.rationale: `0` disables automatic Grafana managed-toolchain downloads
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_DEV_OBSERVABILITY_BACKEND
variables.rationale: Current dev observability backend, for example `victoria`
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_DEV_POSTGRES_ADMIN_URL
variables.rationale: Explicit admin Postgres URL for the managed dev database planner
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_DEV_POSTGRES_BIN
variables.rationale: Explicit local `postgres` binary path; scenery does not search `PATH` for it
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_DEV_POSTGRES_EXTERNAL
variables.rationale: `1` keeps an explicit external `DatabaseURL` instead of creating a managed session database. External mode requires `DatabaseURL`; `DATABASE_URL` is ignored as the app database authority.
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_DEV_POSTGRES_INITDB
variables.rationale: Explicit local `initdb` binary path; scenery does not search `PATH` for it
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_DEV_REPORT_TOKEN
variables.rationale: Token used by the app child to report logs/traces to the dev dashboard
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_DEV_REPORT_URL
variables.rationale: Dev dashboard report endpoint
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_DEV_SUPERVISOR
variables.rationale: Marks a child process launched by `scenery up`
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_DEV_SUPERVISOR_PID
variables.rationale: Parent dev supervisor PID
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_DEV_VICTORIA
variables.rationale: `0` disables Victoria sidecars
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_DEV_VICTORIA_DIR
variables.rationale: Overrides Victoria runtime state root. Managed binaries still live under `.scenery/toolchain/` or `SCENERY_TOOLCHAIN_DIR`
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_DEV_VICTORIA_DOWNLOAD
variables.rationale: `0` disables automatic Victoria managed-toolchain downloads
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_DISABLE_FRONTEND_PROXY
variables.rationale: Disables frontend proxy/upstream discovery in the legacy local proxy outside the normal scenery up path
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_ELECTRIC_URL
variables.rationale: scenery-prefixed Electric route
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_ENV
variables.rationale: App environment name such as `development`, `test`, or `production`
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_FRONTEND_
variables.rationale: Dynamic prefix used to build SCENERY_FRONTEND_<NAME>_ADDR manual frontend upstream overrides.
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_FRONTEND_*_ADDR
variables.rationale: Manual frontend upstream override, for example `SCENERY_FRONTEND_PULSE_ADDR=127.0.0.1:4321`
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_GRAFANA_BIN
variables.rationale: Explicit Grafana binary path
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_GRAFANA_DIR
variables.rationale: Overrides Grafana runtime state root. Managed binaries still live under `.scenery/toolchain/` or `SCENERY_TOOLCHAIN_DIR`
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_GRAFANA_DOWNLOAD_SHA256
variables.rationale: Checksum for a custom Grafana download
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_GRAFANA_DOWNLOAD_URL
variables.rationale: Custom Grafana archive URL
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_GRAFANA_HOME
variables.rationale: Overrides Grafana home for an explicit binary or custom download path
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_GRAFANA_PLUGINS_PREINSTALL_SYNC
variables.rationale: Comma-separated Grafana plugin install list
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_GRAFANA_PORT
variables.rationale: Preferred Grafana loopback port
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_GRAFANA_PRESERVE_GF_ENV
variables.rationale: `1` allows ambient `GF_*` variables through to Grafana
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_GRAFANA_PUBLIC_URL
variables.rationale: Overrides advertised Grafana browser URL
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_GRAFANA_REUSE_EXTERNAL
variables.rationale: `1` allows reusing an externally managed Grafana
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_GRAFANA_VERSION
variables.rationale: Overrides the pinned Grafana version
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_INTEGRATION_
variables.rationale: Prefix reserved for integration-test-only process controls.
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_LISTEN_ADDR
variables.rationale: Runtime listen address or Unix socket path
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_LISTEN_NETWORK
variables.rationale: Runtime listen network, usually `unix` in agent dev or `tcp` otherwise
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_LOCAL_PROXY
variables.rationale: `1` is rejected by normal scenery up; retained for legacy local proxy internals and tests
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_LOCAL_PROXY_HTTPS_PORT
variables.rationale: Overrides the legacy local proxy HTTPS port outside the normal scenery up path
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_LOCAL_PROXY_HTTP_PORT
variables.rationale: Overrides the legacy local proxy HTTP port outside the normal scenery up path
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_LOCAL_PROXY_SKIP_TRUST_INSTALL
variables.rationale: `1` skips local CA trust installation for the legacy local proxy outside the normal scenery up path
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_LOGS_BACKEND
variables.rationale: Selects the dev-event backend for logs, attach, TUI, and console when debugging the VictoriaLogs read path.
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_LOG_FORMAT
variables.rationale: Runtime log format selected by CLI flags or env
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_MANAGED_DATABASE_NAME
variables.rationale: Name of the managed per-session Postgres database
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_MANAGED_DATABASE_URL
variables.rationale: Managed per-session Postgres URL exposed for tooling/debugging
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_PARENT_MONITOR
variables.rationale: Enables runtime parent monitoring
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_PARENT_MONITOR_PID
variables.rationale: Parent PID watched by runtime parent monitoring
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_PUBLIC_APP_URL
variables.rationale: Public app URL for auth and app code
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_PUBLIC_BASE_URL
variables.rationale: Public API base URL advertised to app code
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_RELEASE_GATE_EXTERNAL_APP_ROOT
variables.rationale: Optional external app root for release-gate smoke validation
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_RELEASE_GATE_LOG_DIR
variables.rationale: Release-gate log directory override
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_ONLV_SMOKE_LOG_DIR
variables.rationale: Log directory override for the ONLV two-worktree release-gate smoke
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_ONLV_SMOKE_ROOT
variables.rationale: ONLV checkout root for the two-worktree release-gate smoke
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_ONLV_SMOKE_TMPDIR
variables.rationale: Short temporary directory root for the ONLV two-worktree release-gate smoke
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_ROLE
variables.rationale: Generated binary role: `all`, `api`, or `worker`
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_RUNTIME_APP_ID
variables.rationale: Session-qualified runtime app ID
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_RUNTIME_ENV
variables.rationale: Runtime environment name used by scenery internals
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_SESSION_ID
variables.rationale: Agent session ID for local dev
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_SHADCN_OVERWRITE
variables.rationale: `1` permits overwrite operations in the dashboard shadcn wrapper
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_SHADCN_REGISTRY_ROOT
variables.rationale: UI registry root override for the dashboard shadcn wrapper
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_SHADCN_VERSION
variables.rationale: shadcn CLI version override for the dashboard wrapper
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_STANDALONE_DEV
variables.rationale: Marks a generated runtime process started in standalone dev mode
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_TEMPORAL_BIN
variables.rationale: Explicit Temporal CLI binary path for local dev server and deployment admin commands. Without this, scenery uses the managed toolchain artifact
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_TEMPORAL_DEPLOYMENT_NAME
variables.rationale: Temporal Worker Deployment name override
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_TEMPORAL_HOST_RESOURCE_REPORTING
variables.rationale: `0` disables Temporal Go SDK host resource reporting. Enabled by default
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_TEMPORAL_TASK_QUEUE
variables.rationale: Worker task queue override; `scenery worker --task-queue` sets it
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_TEMPORAL_TASK_QUEUE_PREFIX
variables.rationale: Overrides generated Temporal task queue prefix. Agent dev sets this to a session-scoped value
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_TEMPORAL_VERSIONING_BEHAVIOR
variables.rationale: `pinned` or `auto_upgrade`; default is `pinned`
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_TEST_
variables.rationale: Prefix reserved for test-only process controls.
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_TEST_DATABASE_URL
variables.rationale: PostgreSQL admin URL for integration tests that need a real database; tests create package-scoped databases from it
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_TEST_WATCH_BACKUP_POLL_MS
variables.rationale: Integration-test escape hatch read by the dev watcher to shorten the backup polling path when fsnotify events are missed during process-level reload tests.
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_TEST_WATCH_POLL_MS
variables.rationale: Integration-test escape hatch read by the dev watcher to shorten file snapshot polling during process-level reload tests.
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_TEST_WATCH_SETTLE_DELAY_MS
variables.rationale: Integration-test escape hatch read by the dev watcher to shorten file-watch debounce timing during process-level reload tests.
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_TOOLCHAIN_DIR
variables.rationale: Overrides the managed toolchain store root. Default is `.scenery/toolchain/` under the app or repo root
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_TOOLCHAIN_DOWNLOAD
variables.rationale: `0` disables automatic downloads for managed toolchain binaries
variables.preferred_surface: .scenery.json, explicit CLI flags, or scenery.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: SCENERY_VICTORIA_LOGS
variables.rationale: Prefix used by VictoriaLogs-specific env naming. Do not set this key directly

variables.rationale: Explicit VictoriaLogs binary path
